tips_en: I recommend starting with WorldDirector (Paper 3), as it tackles a fundamental and widely-recognized challenge in video world models—object permanence and dynamic memory—with an elegant architectural decoupling (LLM as semantic motion planner). Papers 1 and 3 both sit in generative AI and pursue complementary deployment goals: MrFlow accelerates inference (efficiency) while WorldDirector enhances controllability and consistency (quality), making them natural companions for future video generation pipelines. Paper 2 is more orthogonal, but reading it after provides a useful contrast on how LLM agents are benchmarked for structured reasoning tasks.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读WorldDirector（论文3），因为它解决了视频世界模型中一个基础且广受关注的问题——物体持久性与动态记忆，并提出了优雅的架构解耦（用LLM作为语义运动规划器）。论文1和论文3都属于生成式AI领域，但追求互补的部署目标：MrFlow提升推理效率，WorldDirector增强可控性与一致性，二者在未来的视频生成管线中可天然结合。论文2方向较为独立，可在之后阅读，作为LLM智能体在结构化推理任务中评测方式的对照参考。
